data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) All commits on main (3cd12ec4, 49b9caec, f22ad2fe, 1f87cecc, ad091b00ea57). (2) 1920 tests pass, 0 failures. (3) Config-permissions doctor check covers both settings.toml and registry.json with inspect/ensure/fix paths. (4) Registry save and backfill enforce chmod 0600. (5) No invariant violations. (6) All commit tags use commit: prefix.
